title: Kid and Law Challenge Big Mom
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Luffy, Zoro as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And there is no telling if my powers are exactly like Kaido's!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You were able to summon flame clouds!! That means you've got a shot!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we do nothing, it'll land like Kaido intended...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'd be even worse if he were to run out of steam early.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His clouds would disappear, and onigashima would be sent hurtling towards the surface!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Onigashima is stocked with more weapons and gunpowder than you can imagine....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The whole island is basically a giant bomb!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There wouldn't be time to evacuate the capital!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If it falls, the explosion would deliberate everyone... friends and foes alike!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Then we need to stop luffy....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He willingly put every- thing on his shoulders....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even though he can barely stand!! How can we stop him after that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy is the only one that can defeat Kaido!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Telling him about this dilemma would only add to his burden!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll have to figure it out on our own!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Having trouble on the live floor?

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 34 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
